meta.note: Structured (stat,amount) pairs present at 420454c but absent from current gear.json after normalizing stat names. NOT a blind-restore list: verify each against tooltip/eb_parse decisions — some old values look wrong (Accuracy -10000, Forte 7200) and some were deliberately re-shaped (perStack, kind:rating). Wrathborn id 16 fixed 2026-07-06 as the proven pattern.

items.name: Voidcaller's Treatise
currentDescriptions: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 12% and your Damage is increased by 2%. Your Powers deal 2.5% more damage when you are 25' or further away from your target.

items.name: The Spine of Dominion
currentDescriptions: Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 7%.

items.name: Treads of the Arch-Thrall
currentDescriptions: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Power, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity are increased by 1.0% for 10 seconds. Max Stacks: 5 — 5% Power, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity.

When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Power, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity are increased by 1.0% for 10 seconds. Max Stacks: 5 — 5% Power, Critical Strike, and Critical Severity.

items.name: Enchanted Depthweave Coat
currentDescriptions: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Accuracy and Combat Advantage for 15 seconds. Max 5 stacks: 7.5% Accuracy and Combat Advantage. Conditional (combat proc), off when standing.

currentDescriptions: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave maximum increases by 20%. Gain 5% Outgoing Healing.

items.name: Sabatons of the Deathless Faith
currentDescriptions: Healing an ally with an Encounter power heals you for 80,000 and grants the allies close to you 3.5% Defense for 5 seconds.

currentDescriptions: Your current Hit Points decreases your Incoming Damage, up to a max of 4%. Your maximum Hit Points are increased by 5%.

currentDescriptions: 3 of Set: Rune of the Underdark — When you use a Daily power, create a rune on the ground for 6 sec, empowering any ally who stands upon it with 5% Accuracy, 5% Critical Strike, and increases outgoing damage by 5%. Does not stack with other Runes of the Underdark.

originalEntries.name: Dashing Decoy

originalEntries.assumption: Stand-still condition is modeled with configurable expected uptime (default 50%).
